channel.title: AI Research Brief
channel.description: Automated AI paper collection, ranking, and compact bilingual research briefs.

item.title: Improve vision-language alignment, reuse coding-agent skills, and evaluate video segmentation and music generation
item.description: Today tracks: vision-language representation editing, coding-agent skill reuse, video-instance segmentation diagnostics, and low-data text-to-music generation. Source page: https://aici.ccwu.cc/en/daily/2026-06-07-tevi-text-conditioned-editing-of-visual-representations-sources/
item.content: Improve vision language alignment, reuse coding agent skills, and evaluate video segmentation and music generation What is worth tracking today This is a lightweight restored issue based on the real 2026 06 05 arXiv candidate pool. It uses a reranked selection so the issue can remain useful while using only real arXiv candidates. Featured papers: core problem, method signal, and keywords 1. Vision language representation editing

item.title: Strengthen multimodal alignment, enterprise RAG retrieval, and agent engineering reliability
item.description: Today tracks: multimodal alignment, enterprise RAG, agentic coding decisions, and system efficiency. Source page: https://aici.ccwu.cc/en/daily/2026-06-06-koda-contrastive-representation-comparison-and-alignment-for-sources/
item.content: Strengthen multimodal alignment, enterprise RAG retrieval, and agent engineering reliability What is worth tracking today This is a lightweight restored issue using real arXiv paper links and abstract level signals. It follows the latest compact issue style and does not include the full candidate scoring table. Featured papers: core problem, method signal, and keywords 1. Multimodal representation alignment
